top_signals.title: Oil Rallies as Iran and Israel Exchange Fresh Missile Attacks
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped after Iran and Israel traded fire, despite US President Donald Trump’s calls for both sides to quit fighting, a fresh escalation in a war that has passed the 100-day mark.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FirstFT: AI sell-off spooks global markets
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: Iran and Israel trade fire while Intesa Sanpaolo launches €30bn bid for rival bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority – Memorandum of Understanding on the supervision of Financial Market Infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Joint statement from the Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Korean Leveraged ETF Misfires, Jumps 50% Even as SK Hynix Slumps
top_signals.summary: A leveraged exchange-traded fund tied to SK Hynix Inc. surged 50% on Monday despite a drop of nearly 8% in the underlying stock, a dislocation the fund house later attributed to a lack of liquidity in its market-making system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

Chancellor Rachel Reeves speech at the Scientific Superpower Conference
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has today (3 June) delivered a speech at the Scientific Superpower Conference.

top_signals.title: Toto to fully resume bathroom orders as supply concerns ease
top_signals.summary: The company is going back to normal delivery schedules as the supply outlook for raw materials has improved.
